name: Baseline-009: length-residualized embedding similarity (the obvious smart-fix that doesn't work)
description: First detection submission tested under v3 bars (D1+D2+D3+D4, including the new 7.7.9 capitalization-control). Takes Baseline-008's sentence-transformer cosine similarity and residualizes it against length: score = sim - (intercept + slope*word_length), where (intercept, slope) is fit unsupervised on the benchmark's (sim, length) pairs without using class labels. Pre-stated prediction (committed BEFORE the run at d0de04b): the obvious smart-fix DOESN'T clear D3 because residualization removes signal rather than adding new orthogonal signal above the floor.
pre_stated_prediction: submissions/baseline_009_residualized_embedding/PRE_STATED_PREDICTION.md committed at commit d0de04b BEFORE the gauntlet run. Predicted ~3% PASS, ~30% pass D2 only (modal), ~35% fail all 4. Actual outcome (D2 only, 1/4) fell in the modal 30% region.

reported.note: Scored under 7.7.9 v3 detection bars (D1, D2, D3 length-control, D4 capitalization-control). Only D2 passes. The pre-stated modal prediction is confirmed: length-residualization removes the length-correlated component of the score, which actively LOWERS detector AUC below the length oracle's AUC by construction. Delta on D1 = -0.145; delta on D2 = -0.029. The path through D3 needs signal orthogonal to length, not signal with length removed.

prediction_calibration.modal_outcome_predicted: D2 passes, D1 fails, D3 fails wide, D4 marginal — confirmed in shape
prediction_calibration.D1_calibration: actual slightly above predicted range — more residual signal on the broad axis than expected, but still below the 0.70 bar
prediction_calibration.D2_calibration: actual inside predicted range, near top
prediction_calibration.D3_D1_delta_calibration: actual just at top of predicted range (less destructive than expected)
prediction_calibration.n_individual_predictions_inside_range: 3 of 4 specific AUC predictions inside or just at boundary of their pre-stated ranges. Significantly better calibration than the confound audit's 3/8 (FINDING_confound_audit_2026_05_27.md).

notes: n=1 evidence that length-residualization does not clear the D3 bar — it actively widens the gap (delta -0.145 on D1) by construction. The residual still tracks the cap-ratio confound modestly (D4 fails by -0.059). On the narrower folklore axis (D2), residualization preserves enough non-length semantic signal to clear the AUC=0.70 bar but not the D3-vs-length comparison. Modal pre-stated prediction confirmed: the path through D3 requires signal genuinely orthogonal to length (NLI-based answer-form detection, specificity scoring, or cross-vendor council disagreement), not the length variance removed from the same signal. Baseline-010 is the disciplined follow-up: a method that adds new signal rather than subtracting old signal.
